samples.xml_description:
<module id="pulse_detect">
    <description>Pulse Detection Unit</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Reset signal (active low).</input>
        <input id="data_in">One-bit input signal.</input>
        <output id="data_out">Output signal indicating the presence of pulses.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <!-- Define any necessary parameters here -->
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="sequential_logic">
        // Declare any necessary registers or variables here
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
// State machine for detecting pulses
reg [2:0] state;
always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
    if (!rst_n) begin
        state <= 3'd0;
        data_out <= 1'b0;
    end else begin
        case(state)
            3'd0: begin
                if(data_in == 1'b1) begin
                    state <= 3'd1;
                end
            end
            3'd1: begin
                if(data_in == 1'b0) begin
                    state <= 3'd2;
                end
            end
            3'd2: begin
                if(data_in == 1'b1) begin
                    state <= 3'd3;
                end
            end
            3'd3: begin
                if(data_in == 1'b0) begin
                    state <= 3'd4;
                end
            end
            3'd4: begin
                if(data_in == 1'b1) begin
                    state <= 3'd5;
                end
            end
            3'd5: begin
                data_out <= 1'b1;
                if(data_in == 1'b0) begin
                    state <= 3'd0;
                end
            end
            default: state <= 3'd0;
        endcase
    end
end
    </implementation>
    
</module>
